sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n83352" key="pitteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πιττεύω</orth>, indistinct pronunciation of <sense id="n83352.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πιστεύω, ἡ ψελλὴ "οὐ πιττεύω"</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">App.Prov.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.17</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
